summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Locofast CMS fabric catalog website. All core functionality working perfectly including homepage, fabric catalog, admin panel, and contact forms.
passed_tests: Homepage with hero section, featured categories, and featured fabrics
Fabrics page with search and category filters working
Fabric detail page with image gallery and specifications
Enquiry modal and form submission with success notifications
Contact page form submission with success notifications
Admin dashboard with correct stats display
Admin navigation to fabrics, categories, enquiries management
Static pages (About, How It Works, Contact) rendering properly
Navigation between all pages working correctly
